items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Can I borrow a pencil?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L13-01 - E1131 - Ethan - Can I borrow a pencil.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Can I use your eraser too?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L13-05 - E1135 - Noah - Can I use your eraser too.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I can buy some rice.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L29-06 - E1296 - Ethan - I can buy some rice.mp3

items.speaker: Pharmacist
items.text: How can I help you?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L37-01 - E1371 - Pharmacist - How can I help you.mp3

items.speaker: Clerk
items.text: Good afternoon. How can I help?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L42-01 - E1421 - Clerk - Good afternoon. How can I help.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Can I have a card too?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L42-05 - E1425 - Ethan - Can I have a card too.mp3

items.speaker: Clerk
items.text: Can I help you?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L44-01 - E1441 - Clerk - Can I help you.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Can I come with you?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L04-06 - E2046 - Ethan - Can I come with you.mp3

items.speaker: Sofia
items.text: I saw a nice journal. I can show it to you.
items.translation: Vi un diario bonito. Puedo mostrárselo.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L16-04 - E2164 - Sofia - I saw a nice journal. I can show it to you.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Can I go to school tomorrow?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L23-06 - E2236 - Noah - Can I go to school tomorrow.mp3

items.speaker: Sofia
items.text: I can't believe I've done it.
items.translation: No puedo creer que lo hice.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L30-02 - E2302 - Sofia - I can't believe I've done it.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: It might be cold at night.
items.translation: Puede que haga frío por la noche.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L32-02 - E2322 - Emma - It might be cold at night.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I can start next Saturday.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L39-06 - E2396 - Ethan - I can start next Saturday.mp3

items.speaker: Customer
items.text: Can I exchange it?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L42-03 - E2423 - Customer - Can I exchange it.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Can I check my balance online?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L44-06 - E2446 - Ethan - Can I check my balance online.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I can't believe I've been accepted.
items.translation: No puedo creer que fui aceptado.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L49-04 - E2494 - Ethan - I can't believe I've been accepted.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Tell me what I can do.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L08-06 - BR1086 - Leo - Tell me what I can do.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Yes, I can accept that.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L16-06 - BR1166 - Leo - Yes, I can accept that.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: I can't believe this is happening.
items.translation: No puedo creer que esto esté pasando.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L33-06 - BR1336 - Ben - I can't believe this is happening.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: No way!
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L36-04 - BR1364 - Leo - No way!.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Can I use it in formal writing?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L41-05 - BR1415 - Leo - Can I use it in formal writing.mp3
